prompt_task: Using the human SHH MANE Select transcript on hg38, consider the coding sequence within exon 1. Within this interval, identify all OMIM allelic variants with phenotypes that map to single-nucleotide missense substitutions in SHH. Retrieve the AlphaMissense pathogenicity scores for those amino-acid substitutions. Return the single variant with the highest AlphaMissense score, in chr:pos (1-based) format. Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
